name: json-fragments
description: Simple extention for fast preview json structures in any type file

commands.title: JSON Fragments: Scan Visible JSON Fragments
JSON Fragments: Toggle Highlight for File
JSON Fragments: Toggle Temporary Highlight for Focused Files

json-fragments.autoHighlightVisibleRange.description: Automatically highlight JSON fragments in the visible ranges of the active editor.

json-fragments.includePrimitiveArrays.description: Treat empty arrays and arrays containing only primitive values as JSON fragments.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
